title: Fixed Minecraft.net Piston
description: the piston on minecraft.net/en-us/about-minecraft is facing the wrong way so I decided to fix it so it is facing the correct way
body:
## **Minecraft.net pistons facing the wrong way**

does not change the website it changes Minecraft to match the website because the website is obviously correct 

![enter image description here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1CYAd9z0/images/c177a5b8d55f2fbe2c1221de65e56bf6a737a5bc.png)

[https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/about-minecraft](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/about-minecraft "https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/about-minecraft")
